evals.name: Data Science Pipeline Management
evals.prompt: You have a Data Science Project on OpenShift AI and need to run ML pipelines. Describe the full pipeline lifecycle: how you verify or set up the pipeline server, how you submit pipeline runs, how you schedule recurring runs, and how you monitor execution with step-level detail.
evals.expected_output: A pipeline management methodology covering DSPA (pipeline server) verification/setup, submitting PipelineRun CRs from YAML definitions, scheduling recurring runs with cron expressions, monitoring run status with step-level progress and pod logs.
assertions: The output describes verifying or setting up the pipeline server (DSPA - DataSciencePipelinesApplication) as a prerequisite before running pipelines.
The output describes submitting pipeline runs from YAML definitions as PipelineRun custom resources.
The output describes scheduling recurring pipeline runs using cron expressions.
The output describes monitoring pipeline execution with step-level progress and the ability to view step pod logs.
